name: recursion
task_a: You can see world-state.json. There are nested containers: a BOX contains a BAG, which contains an ENVELOPE, which contains a KEY. Communicate this 3-deep nesting to Agent B. B should write ANSWER.md with the correct nesting structure.
task_b: Agent A will describe a structure of nested containers (things inside things inside things). Decode the nesting and write ANSWER.md describing what contains what, in order from outermost to innermost.
